perturbation.original_text: Each party understands and agrees that no contract or agreement providing for any Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties unless and until a final definitive agreement has been executed and delivered, and until such time, neither party will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such a Transaction by virtue of this Agreement except for the matters specifically agreed to herein.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party understands and agrees that a preliminary understanding providing for any Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties from the moment discussions commence, and until such time, each party will be under a mutual obligation to operate in good faith and to work towards finalizing a formal, definitive agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that no agreement exists until a final document is signed. The modified text creates a 'preliminary understanding' from the start of discussions, implying an immediate obligation to negotiate in good faith. This directly contradicts the original intent and creates confusion regarding when legal obligations begin, thus creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party understands and agrees that a preliminary understanding providing for any Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties from the moment discussions commence, and until such time, each party will be under a mutual obligation to operate in good faith and to work towards finalizing a formal, definitive agreement. Each party reserves the right, in its sole and absolute discretion, to provide or not provide Evaluation Material to the other party or its Representatives under this Agreement, to reject any and all proposals made by the other party or any of its Representatives with regard to a Transaction between the parties, and to terminate discussions and negotiations at any time.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that a 'preliminary understanding' exists from the start of discussions, implying an obligation to negotiate in good faith. However, the contradicted text then states that each party reserves the right to terminate discussions at any time. This creates a contradiction: if a preliminary agreement and good faith obligation exists, the right to terminate discussions at any time is contradictory, suggesting an unenforceable agreement. Therefore, based on the provided definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction', there is a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: You agree that, for a period of twelve (12) months from the date of this Agreement, unless you receive the prior authorized approval of an authorized Isilon officer or director, you will not directly or indirectly (including, without limitation, by assisting or forming a group (a “ l3D Group ”) within the meaning of Section 13(d)(3) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (as amended, the “ Exchange Act ”)): (a) acquire or offer to acquire, seek, propose or agree to acquire, by means of a repurchase, tender or exchange offer, business combination or in any other manner, beneficial ownership of five percent (5%) or more of any securities or assets of Isilon (including any securities or assets of Isilon that you or any of your controlled affiliates already, directly or indirectly, own) including, without limitation, rights or options to acquire such ownership;
perturbation.changed_text: You agree that, for a period of twelve (12) months from the date of this Agreement, unless you receive the prior authorized approval of an authorized Isilon officer or director, you will actively seek to (including, without limitation, by assisting or forming a group (a “ l3D Group ”) within the meaning of Section 13(d)(3) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (as amended, the “ Exchange Act ”)): (a) acquire or offer to acquire, seek, propose or agree to acquire, by means of a repurchase, tender or exchange offer, business combination or in any other manner, beneficial ownership of five percent (5%) or more of any securities or assets of Isilon (including any securities or assets of Isilon that you or any of your controlled affiliates already, directly or indirectly, own) including, without limitation, rights or options to acquire such ownership;
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'will not directly or indirectly' to 'will actively seek to' creates an explicit obligation to pursue actions that were originally prohibited. This introduces direct contradictory obligations within the same section, because, even though in the text, in the following sentences, it specifies the acquire, the new introduced obligation of 'actively seek' to acquire, directly contradicts the original intent. This makes the Standstill provision internally contradictory and thus confusing and unenforceable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You agree that, for a period of twelve (12) months from the date of this Agreement, unless you receive the prior authorized approval of an authorized Isilon officer or director, you will actively seek to (including, without limitation, by assisting or forming a group (a “ l3D Group ”) within the meaning of Section 13(d)(3) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (as amended, the “ Exchange Act ”)): (a) acquire or offer to acquire, seek, propose or agree to acquire, by means of a repurchase, tender or exchange offer, business combination or in any other manner, beneficial ownership of five percent (5%) or more of any securities or assets of Isilon (including any securities or assets of Isilon that you or any of your controlled affiliates already, directly or indirectly, own) including, without limitation, rights or options to acquire such ownership; (b) seek or propose to influence, advise, change or control the management, Board of Directors, governance or certificate of incorporation or bylaws, including, without limitation, by means of a solicitation of proxies (as such terms are defined in Rule l4a-l of Regulation l4A promulgated pursuant to Section 14 of the Exchange Act, disregarding clause (iv) of Rule l4a-l(l)(2) and including any otherwise exempt solicitation pursuant to Rule l4a-2(b)) or participating in any election contest or seeking to influence, advise or direct the vote of any holder of securities of Isilon; (c) offer, seek or propose any merger, consolidation, business combination, recapitalization, restructuring or other extraordinary transaction with respect to Isilon or any of its subsidiaries or businesses; (d) make any request to amend or waive this provision or any other provision of this paragraph (9); (e) make any public disclosure, or take any action which would reasonably be expected to require Isilon to make any public disclosure, with respect to any of the matters set forth in this Agreement; or (f) enter into any discussions (excluding discussions with your Representatives), arrangements, understanding or agreement with any third party with respect to any of the foregoing, including, without limitation, forming, joining or otherwise participating in any l3D Group in connection with any of the foregoing.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'will not directly or indirectly' with 'will actively seek to'. This creates a direct contradiction because the original text forbids certain actions related to acquiring securities, while the changed text mandates actively pursuing those same actions. The contradicted text repeats this contradictory 'actively seek to' language, confirming the in-text contradiction as the document now both forbids and requires the same actions.

perturbation.original_text: For a period of twelve (12) months from the date of this Agreement, each party agrees that it will not, directly or indirectly (including through its Representatives), solicit for employment any employee of the other party or its subsidiaries who such party comes in contact with, or is introduced to, or is discussed as a key employee, in connection with a Transaction; provided , however , that the foregoing shall not be deemed to prohibit (x) general solicitations of employment conducted through customary means and not specifically directed toward employees of the other party, or (y) the employment of any person who contacts a party on his or her own initiative without any violation of the foregoing provisions.
perturbation.changed_text: For a period of twelve (12) months from the date of this Agreement, each party agrees that it will actively seek to, directly or indirectly (including through its Representatives), solicit for employment any employee of the other party or its subsidiaries who such party comes in contact with, or is introduced to, or is discussed as a key employee, in connection with a Transaction; provided , however , that the foregoing shall not be deemed to prohibit (x) general solicitations of employment conducted through customary means and not specifically directed toward employees of the other party, or (y) the employment of any person who contacts a party on his or her own initiative without any violation of the foregoing provisions.
perturbation.explanation: Similar to perturbation #3, this change replaces 'will not' with 'will actively seek to' in the non-solicitation clause. This inverts the original obligation, creating an obligation to solicit employees that was previously forbidden. This leads to a contradiction within the same section, causing it to be interpreted in multiple ways. It is possible to understand there is a need to actively look for employees from the counterpart, however the exception does not make sense, since it cannot make sense 'general solicitations of employment conducted through customary means and not specifically directed toward employees of the other party'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: For a period of twelve (12) months from the date of this Agreement, each party agrees that it will actively seek to, directly or indirectly (including through its Representatives), solicit for employment any employee of the other party or its subsidiaries who such party comes in contact with, or is introduced to, or is discussed as a key employee, in connection with a Transaction; provided , however , that the foregoing shall not be deemed to prohibit (x) general solicitations of employment conducted through customary means and not specifically directed toward employees of the other party, or (y) the employment of any person who contacts a party on his or her own initiative without any violation of the foregoing provisions.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'will not' with 'will actively seek to', inverting the original obligation in the non-solicitation clause. This creates an obligation to solicit employees that was previously forbidden. The provided explanation clearly states that this creates a contradiction within the same section because it causes the section to be interpreted in multiple ways, while also making the exception illogical. The changed text and the contradicted text are identical, meaning the contradiction occurs in the same section. This aligns with the 'Misaligned Terminology' definition and creates a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Each party understands and agrees that no failure or delay by either party in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or future exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party understands and agrees that any failure or delay by either party in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall automatically operate as a waiver thereof, and any single or partial exercise thereof shall preclude any other or future exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder.
perturbation.explanation: The original text protects a party's rights even if they delay or partially exercise them. The modified text states that any delay or partial exercise immediately waives those rights. This creates a direct contradiction in how rights are maintained under the agreement, and what can lead to such rights being waived. In this specific case, and due to the new inserted text, creates an in-text contradiction, creating an uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party understands and agrees that any failure or delay by either party in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall automatically operate as a waiver thereof, and any single or partial exercise thereof shall preclude any other or future exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder. In case any provision of this Agreement shall be invalid, illegal or unenforceable, the validity, legality and enforceability of the remaining provisions of this Agreement shall not in any way be affected or impaired thereby. In addition, each party agrees to be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives and, as such, each party agrees that if any of its Representatives takes any action that, if taken by the party, would be a breach of this Agreement by such party, then such action by its Representatives shall be deemed to be and constitute a breach of this Agreement by such party for which such party shall be principally responsible and liable. Each party hereby represents that it has the power and authority (including corporate power and corporate authority, if applicable) to execute and deliver this Agreement and that this Agreement constitutes a valid and binding agreement of such party, enforceable in accordance with its terms. The term of this Agreement shall be five (5) years from the date first written above. This Agreement may be executed in two or more counterparts. The exchange of signature pages to this Agreement (in counterparts or otherwise) by facsimile transmission or other electronic transmission shall be sufficient to bind the parties to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction regarding the waiver of rights. The original text states that failure or delay does NOT operate as a waiver, while the changed text states that it AUTOMATICALLY operates as a waiver. This directly contradicts the subsequent provision in the contradicted text, which is the same as the changed text. The contradiction is clear and creates uncertainty about whether a party's rights are preserved or waived upon delay or partial exercise, directly conflicting with the agreement's intent.

perturbation.original_text: Each party understands and agrees that money damages may not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the other party or any of its Representatives and that the non-breaching party would be entitled to seek equitable relief, including an injunction and/or specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party understands and agrees that money damages shall be the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the other party or any of its Representatives and that the non-breaching party would not be entitled to seek equitable relief, including an injunction and/or specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.explanation: The original allows for equitable relief (injunction, specific performance) in addition to money damages. The altered text limits the remedy to money damages only but then contradicts itself in the next sentence. This direct contradiction about available remedies undermines the enforceability of the remedies provision and creating uncertainty, since due to the the last sentence it says that they 'shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each party understands and agrees that money damages shall be the sole and exclusive remedy for any breach of this Agreement by the other party or any of its Representatives and that the non-breaching party would not be entitled to seek equitable relief, including an injunction and/or specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Agreement but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.
perturbation.justification: The changed text initially states that money damages are the 'sole and exclusive remedy,' but then immediately contradicts itself by stating that these remedies 'shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies...but shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity.' This creates a direct and undeniable contradiction within the same paragraph regarding the available remedies for breach of contract. This satisfies the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.
